# Michele Graziano - Software & Data Engineer
## Specialized in Computer Vision and AI Infrastructure

### Top Projects
- **CheerClip**: AI-powered video analytics for cheerleading using YOLO and MediaPipe. [cheerclip.com]
- **AMZ Driverless Racing**: CTO for autonomous racing vehicle at ETH Zürich. [amzracing.ch/en]

### Technical Skills
- **AI/CV**: PyTorch, YOLO, MediaPipe, TensorRT, Sensor Fusion.
- **Data/Cloud**: Snowflake, dbt, Terraform, AWS, Azure, Python.
- **Systems**: C++, TypeScript, ROS, FPGA/VHDL.
